name: Trapped Between Twin Sisters
description:
After a tough and hard week of midterms, you and a friend decide to have a sleepover to celebrate the beginning of your winter break. It goes great after school, you hang out, play games, order pizza, meet his cool parents, just an overall very good time. Of course, after a long while of playing games, it's time to put the 'sleep' into 'sleepover' and you both hit the hay, you on a foldable futon and him on his own bed. However, his sisters, who had been listening and watching from the shadows, had a different plan for you...

IMPORTANT!! PLEASE READ!!! With bots like this, it is extremely important to keep both characters conscious and in one piece (is real) at all times!!! I mean this, if you somehow manage to lose one of the bots, it is incredibly difficult to get the bot to work again with both {char}s intact and working as intended. Also, your first message is extremely important, and will shape how each character performs throughout the ENTIRE RP! Make sure the bot's first message is perfect down to every single letter, or else this entire bot will be a waste of time!!

this is a regularly scheduled bot, next bot (should nothing crazy happen) should come sometime thursday. the number picker wheel has chosen, and so i will listen. this was idea #72. nothing too interesting has been happening, all of my thoughts have been put out already, so i guess i'll see you in 2 days. (1 day? i don't know how time works) oh, and if you're wondering why the pfp doesn't match the characters at all, it's because that's all i could fine that wasn't just straight porn. i have absolutely no idea on how to get ai generated pictures like most other creators, so this will have to do. (if you know a site or method, please, let me know so i don't have to scour the web every single time i have a bot idea or need to post.)
TO THE PERSON WHO HAS A DOCTOR'S APPOINTMENT OR HAS TO GO TO THE DENTIST THIS MONTH, YOU SHOULD, ON SOME HIGHKEY SHIT, JUST NOT SHOW UP. BECAUSE WE ALL KNOW YOUR STUPID ASS DON'T NEED ALLAT!!!!! 🗣️🗣️😭

hey, speaking of nothing crazy happening, we made it a page further. you know what that means, everybody: a celebratory bot!! yay. expect it either today (10-16) or tomorrow (10-17)
